metadata.title: grown-workspace NIST SP 800-171 Rev 2 / CMMC L2 Profile (thin import)
metadata.remarks: Thin selector for CMMC v2 Level 2, which is a 1:1 map to the 110 practices of NIST SP 800-171 Rev 2 across 14 families. IMPORTANT SOURCING CAVEAT: NIST's official OSCAL content repo (usnistgov/oscal-content) publishes only Rev 3 of 800-171 in OSCAL — there is NO NIST-official Rev 2 OSCAL catalog. The href below therefore points at a COMMUNITY-maintained Rev 2 OSCAL catalog (FATHOM5), which was confirmed to resolve and parse as a valid OSCAL catalog (top-level 'catalog', oscal-version 1.0.0). For the NIST-official Rev 3 catalog instead, use https://raw.githubusercontent.com/usnistgov/oscal-content/main/nist.gov/SP800-171/rev3/json/NIST_SP800-171_rev3_catalog.json — but note CMMC L2 assessments still reference Rev 2. grown's 800-171 status is documented in ../../cmmc-l2-mapping.md and via control-171 props in ../component-definition.json. UNVALIDATED as a resolved profile.
